headline: Parker Shaffie: Judge Tosses Out Navigators Insurance’s $5 Million Reimbursement Demand Against One Of Its Policyholders
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 04, 2026--A judge ruled Navigators Insurance was not entitled to require a policyholder to reimburse attorney’s fees and costs incurred in its defense.
